{"BaseResp":{"StatusCode":0,"StatusMessage":"success"},"code":0,"data":{"common_list_info":{"cursor":"","has_more":false,"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"20260321212233006EC0F2BDC9DEBFD0F6"}"},"total":13769},"data_list":[{"comment":{"comment_id":"7135355067708310287","common":{"comment_type":20,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"小说很精彩，为数不多很好的反派文了，后宫yyds 虽然女人多，但是从头到我看到现在可没有莫名其妙的写着写着有的女主就不见了，书评区都是人才，有时间看到半夜都睡不着，半夜笑死我，里面梗很多，非常推荐，大爱（车速非常快）[舔屏][舔屏][舔屏][舔屏][舔屏][舔屏]"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1661329382,"group_id":"6974051888933112845","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"分币不刷，就是陪伴！","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N77nEcUb16u1Ts/0NuGpeGScoVIU7CWzSC+YOvZHCKeP","gender":1,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":1,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-1yzifmftcy/72ab2cbf91c44dc5b565ba9ada302159~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776623750&x-signature=MHEBxt92W2Rjw1eglvivIddxo80%3D","user_id":"2959520665442152","user_name":"第-深情"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"2959520665442152","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"sticker":{"expire_time":1675501335,"is_worn":true,"sticker":{"add_context":"","bg_color":"#FFE1DD","can_worn":false,"id":1,"name":"吃瓜群众","small_url":"https://p6-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/99d8abedb53eea031f973b1251119d85","sticker_type":1,"url":"https://p6-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/eaf916cdd4f4860ea2a74b0d0e3718f1"}},"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"6974051888933112845","book_info":{"abstract":"秦朗穿越到多部网文融合的世界，爷爷是硕果仅存的老功勋！
父亲从仕，权柄通天！
母亲经商，身价骇人！
而他，则是秦家唯一的继承人！
这样的通天背景神豪，偏偏却是原著中的大反派？
要被主角疯狂打脸，家族也要成为主角的垫脚石？
“叮！天命大反派系统绑定中……”
什么？掠夺主角气运能获得天命反派值？
反派值能兑换各种神级技能？
秦朗掐腰，脚踩气运之子，一路高歌猛进，站立巅峰大吼一声：“还有谁？！”","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p6-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/2c793938e0d323cbbb9682ff9cc4107f","author":"崭新的小键盘","author_id":"","book_id":"6974051888933112845","book_name":"反派退婚，绝美女总裁哭着求复合","book_short_name":"至尊权贵","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"#401008","creation_status":"0","genre":"0","genre_type":"0","read_count_text":"6.7万人在读","reader_schema":{"authorize_type":"1","category_schema":"[{"category_id":262,"name":"都市脑洞","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=262&name=都市脑洞&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":1,"name":"都市","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=1&name=都市&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":37,"name":"穿越","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=37&name=穿越&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":19,"name":"系统","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=19&name=系统&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":369,"name":"反派","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=369&name=反派&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":850,"name":"无脑爽","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=850&name=无脑爽&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":852,"name":"魂穿","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=852&name=魂穿&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"}]","first_chapter_item_id":"6974052462382547487","read_count":"66451","title_page_tags":"","word_number":"4257541"},"relate_post_id":"","relate_post_schema":"","score":"9.3","serial_count":"1890","tags":"都市脑洞,都市,反派,系统,穿越,无脑爽,魂穿","thumb_url":"https://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/novel-pic/22472200a9d228584a49a18f8b1a9b9a~tplv-noop.image?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1779283353&x-signature=oa8l74MKQ0rLxH2AH%2FzyC8R2W6s%3D","tomato_book_status":"1"},"book_info_list":[],"common_stat":{},"creator_id":"95592572027","extra":{"comment_jump_schema":"","novelapp_read_item_cnt":"5.8553787e+07"},"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"20260321212233006EC0F2BDC9DEBFD0F6"}"},"relate_info_list":[],"reply_show_count":0,"reply_show_row":0,"score":"10","score_suffix_text":"阅读16小时后点评"},"stat":{"digg_count":25,"forwarded_count":0,"listen_duration":0,"read_book_count":0,"read_duration":58553,"reply_count":4,"show_pv":30526},"user_action":{"author":0,"is_author_stick":false,"stick_position":0,"user_digg":false,"user_disagree":false}},"data_type":4},{"comment":{"comment_id":"7186117416785937190","common":{"comment_type":20,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"真的好看，已经追了一年多了。人物刻画的细节非常好而且主角的各种套路，特别的有意思而且女主虽然多，但是不乱不会搞完就没有戏份了。就连一位女配（应该算是吧玉儿）也没有搞完就丢。符合逻辑，让人心情舒畅。他的保镖军子都是我见过情商最高的，也是我看的为数不多的满满成长起来的保镖。完全可以看到他一点点的蜕变。还有郎子他本人的那种成长。以及各女主的各种变化。还有不同派系的女主之间的激烈对抗也十分精彩，而且完完全全在浪子的掌握之中。两大军师两大头头到现在又出了个女帝和他的配加丫鬟，属于第三派系。而且还有后面的洛派变为离派各位女主的性格特征也写得够不相同，但是却十分的有趣，而且让人觉得非常的生动。跳转的也非常好。看起来小键盘就是一个避毒圣人。指不定有多少个女朋友呢。剧情也十分吸引换地图的波折以及内转折都十分的自然让人可以接受。还有后面出现的家族里面的人也十分的温情，让人感觉格外舒服，而不是像其他反派人里面的家族更像一种束缚，一种冷血无情也许这样才是正常的反派家族，但是我还是觉得小键盘的反派家族更符合我心中的那种声音。各类主角也是非常的有意思。真的建议大家可以看一看。还是希望小键盘可以努力写下去。（不要在我下面回复，有钱一起赚，你先看看，我看了几个小时，你再看看我说的剧情，你再说出有钱一起赚。可能就会感觉你很愚蠢。）","text_exts":[{"e":97,"s":95,"text":"舒畅","tp":4,"uri":"dragon1967://search?source=44&hyperlink_type=quote_book&directQueryWord=%E8%88%92%E7%95%85&directSearchSourceId=cmt_link%231774099353DEBFD0F6%230%23%23&directTabType=0&reportDict=%7B%22comment_id%22%3A%227186117416785937190%22%2C%22enter_from_book_id%22%3A%226974051888933112845%22%2C%22hyperlink_position%22%3A%22book_cover_comment_list_page%22%2C%22hyperlink_type%22%3A%22quote_book%22%2C%22link_name%22%3A%22%E8%88%92%E7%95%85%22%2C%22search_sec_entrance%22%3A%22book_cover_comment_list_page%22%7D&halfscreen=false"}]},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1673148476,"group_id":"6974051888933112845","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N/vn+AUk9dQDLcwPvfy57HQ=","gender":1,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":1,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-1yzifmftcy/64caf749970e4524aceaf4ce08434131~t
